I agree with the chosen answer option C: 3 years. While specific provisions may vary depending on jurisdictional laws related to medical malpractice, the general trend across many countries indicates that imprisonment for medical negligence typically ranges between 1 to 3 years. This duration strikes an appropriate balance between deterring negligent behavior and ensuring proportionality relative to other forms of professional misconduct penalties.
